subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-13 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: If the inability of a thing which occupies a lower rank of existence to perceive that which occupies a higher rank was itself indicative of the [non-]existence of that higher rank
subcodes.first_line_orig: عدم احساس و وجدان عالم مادون اگر دلیل بر وجود عالم مافوق باشد نزدیک حیوان جمیع مراتب عقول
subcodes.subjects: @limits of the intellect, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @man's distinction from the animal
